This extension configures the browser for cobas infinity IT solutions

The navify® Lab Operations extension for Chrome is required to work with navify® Lab Operations. The extension automatically configures the necessary settings to avoid any issues caused by browser restrictions.

The extension enables the following permissions for the navify Lab Operations domain specified by the Roche Service Representative.

- Cookies: The extension uses session-only cookies to know about the user and to keep the session  active. The cookies are also needed to keep the user preferences in the session, which are used for the default access for some screens.

- The cookies are removed when the browser is closed. This makes the browser more secure.

- Images: The extension uses images for the visualization purposes. It is required in some of the tests that are linked to images.

- Popups: The extension uses popups to manage specific steps, actions and risk control measures such as warnings for patient safety.

- JavaScript: The extension uses JavaScript for some automatic (dynamic) options such as to activate buttons.

- Clear Cache: The extension clears the cache to remove the old cached versions and to ensure that only the current and new javascript files and images are used. 

- Open and close tabs: The extension also helps to open the application in full screen mode in a single tab and to close the unrequired tab.

It is also recommended to whitelist the navify Lab Operations server IP address and hostname/DNS. This ensures the extension is activated only on the navify Lab Operations server.

Have control over WebRTC (disable | enable) and protect your IP address.

WebRTC Control is an extension that brings you control over WebRTC API in your browser. 

The toolbar icon serves as a toggle button that enables you to quickly disable or enable the add-on (note: the icon will change color once you click on it). This addon does not a have toolbar popup UI. When WebRTC is enabled in your browser, your real IP address will be exposed to the public (even if you're using a masking service such as VPN). But preventing WebRTC leaks helps you protect your IP address. WebRTC Control add-on will also disable the following WebRTC components (see add-on options page):

  a. navigator.getUserMedia 
  b. window.MediaStreamTrack
  c. window.RTCPeerConnection
  d. window.RTCSessionDescription

To report bugs, please visit the extension's homepage (https://mybrowseraddon.com/webrtc-control.html) and fill the bug report form.
Disable WebRTC and prevent IP leak.

Disable WebRTC and prevent IP leak.

VPN Extensions can hide your IP address but they cannot prevent IP leaks caused by WebRTC. WebRTC Leak Shield protects you from this security threat. This is a must have extension for protecting your privacy on the internet. 

WebRTC Leak Shield requires following permissions:

privacy: This allows the extension to change the webrtc settings of the browser to prevent WebRTC IP Leak

storage: To store configuration file and current state of the extension

management: This extension is standalone and does not require any other extension to function but other extension such as VPN extension can embed the functionality of this extension in their extension. (For example: Hoxx VPN). This permission is needed to ensure the communication between WebRTC Leak Shield and other extensions which are using its functionality.

Faster, safer, smarter. Revolut Shopper transforms the way you buy online.

Faster, safer, smarter. Revolut Shopper transforms the way you buy online.
Meet Revolut Shopper, the new browser extension from Revolut, the financial super app trusted by more than 25 million people worldwide. 

Check out in a click faster than ever
Make it easy to shop deals from different websites: just autofill your card number and skip adding your details every checkout. With Shopper, you can finish without any pit stops!

Single-use cards for extra protection
Stay secure with a unique card number for every spend. With your real card details hidden, safe from hackers and fraudsters, you’re free to treat yourself without any worry

You’re in the driver’s seat
With Shopper, you call the shots. Set your own spending limits, and freeze or unfreeze a card anytime. You can also customise each card’s color and name, to tell them apart easily!


Ready to get started? Grab your laptop and add Shopper to your browser to enjoy fast, stress-free online payments.

Any questions, check out our FAQs or reach out via the in-app chat. Happy shopping!


Next steps

✓  Add Revolut Shopper to Chrome - it’s free! 

✓  Once you’ve logged in, go shopping as usual. At checkout, choose which card you want to pay with. 

✓  Single-use virtual cards are perfect for adding security on unfamiliar merchant websites or when you make a big purchase. 

✓  Multi-use virtual cards are ideal for managing all your different subscriptions so you’re always in control. 

✓  Your card details are autofilled at checkout so there’s no need to hunt around for your wallet!
Web form and password filling companion for Sticky Password manager & safe

No more forgotten, weak or reused passwords! Sticky Password is the award-winning password manager and form-filler that has been protecting millions of passwords around the world for more than 17 years. Sticky Password is a powerful yet simple free password manager and secure digital vault for your desktop and mobile device browsers.

It remembers your passwords and enters them automatically whenever and wherever you need them. Sticky Password extension makes your online life easier by typing your data for you in online forms and login pages. You won’t have to worry about typos and entering data on all those sites you visit.

With Sticky Password, your sensitive data is securely stored and encrypted using AES-256 – the world’s leading encryption standard. From now on, you’ll only need to remember just one password - your Master Password - that is the only key that unlocks your encrypted data. It’s created solely by you and it’s not stored anywhere - only you know it.

Sticky Password extension features:

PASSWORD MANAGER
- Remembers all your passwords and types them for you as you browse.
- Saves new passwords and logins as you browse. Automatically.
- Unlimited storage for all your passwords and logins.
- World's leading security—AES-256 encryption

CONTACTLESS CONNECT
Use your smartphone as an authentication tool to access websites securely and effortlessly on any platform and web browser. Just scan, connect, and go for secure password management.

DIGITAL WALLET
- Keep your credit card numbers in the super secured vault that only you can access.
- Pay with one click. Sticky Password enters your credit cards for you on shopping sites.

SYNCHRONIZATION & BACKUP
- Sync all your passwords and credentials to all your devices. Access them anywhere.
- Select from industry-leading sync options—cloud or local WiFi sync.
- Secure cloud backup of all your encrypted data. Only if you want it.

Sticky Password is always free for one device. 

You can get even more with Premium features and manage your passwords and data across all your devices:
- Cloud sync & backup 
- Local Wi-Fi sync
- Priority support

For more info, please have a look at our Terms and Conditions (https://www.stickypassword.com/terms-and-conditions) and Privacy Policy (https://www.stickypassword.com/privacy-policy).
Do Not Track (DNT) and Global Privacy Control (GPC) Enabler
Enable sending of the Do Not Track (DNT) request header. Also sets the Global Privacy Control (GPC) signal.

This extension is intended for deployment in organisations that wish to enable DNT (as DNT: 1) by force, but can't because this is not possible via a policy. Instead, forcibly installing this extension via a policy will enable DNT by force. This extension also sets the Global Privacy Control (GPC) flag to true (via client-side JavaScript only).


CAVEATS

It's possible for any other installed extension to override this one (potentially altering the DNT setting). This can be mitigated by white listing extensions.


GITHUB SOURCE

This extension is extremely simple (as it should be). You can view its source code here - https://github.com/a449707101729771095/dnt-enabler
THIS EXTENSION IS FOR BETA TESTING. An efficient ad blocker that blocks ads across the web.

uBlock Resurrected (BETA)

uBlock Resurrected is an experimental content blocker built from the ground up to bring advanced filtering capabilities to the Manifest V3 (MV3) engine. This is a BETA version intended for testing and development feedback.

Current Status & Beta Limitations:
Engine: Successfully ported core filtering logic to the MV3 declarativeNetRequest and scripting APIs.

UI Work-in-Progress: Users may encounter display issues in the Logger iframe and legacy links to original documentation pages.

YouTube Compatibility: Due to frequent changes in platform architecture, ad-blocking on YouTube may be intermittent as we refine our rulesets.

Known Conflicts: May conflict with other privacy extensions like Privacy Badger or Ghostery. For the best experience, we recommend testing with other blockers disabled.

Platform: Currently optimized for Chrome only.

Logging: Per-page block counters on the extension icon are currently disabled to optimize performance.

Roadmap for Stable Release:
Enhanced Tools: Consolidation of the element zapper and picker into a unified interface.

Advanced Logic: Implementation of keyword-based DOM filtering and procedural cosmetic rules.

Security: Improved firewall rules and network request interception.

Optimization: Full code refactoring to modern ECMAScript standards and UI/UX overhaul.
perc.pass is a simple and secure password management tool.

Designed for teams, companies, and individual users. It allows for the safe storage, organisation, and sharing of access data within project groups, ensuring complete control and privacy at every stage.

🔐 Maximum security

Due to advanced symmetric and asymmetric cryptography and the zero-knowledge principle, only you have access to your passwords. Your main password is never stored or transmitted to any servers, ensuring all your data remains entirely under your control.

📍 Compliance with RODO, NIS2 and DORA

Data is encrypted and securely stored in certified Polish Data Centers, complying with GDPR/RODO regulations and adhering to the latest NIS2 and DORA cybersecurity directives. 

⚡ Auto-fill and password generator

Our integrated browser plug-ins and mobile apps enable swift logins, auto-fill, and on-demand generation of strong passwords.

🔄 Shared entries and one-time links

Securely storing passwords, notes, and credit card information in one place allows for effortless data sharing, ensuring maximum protection and convenience while enhancing organization and team collaboration.

One-time, encrypted links enable swift and secure sharing of access data and notes with clients and subcontractors while eliminating risks and avoiding unnecessary complications.

📊 Security and activity monitoring

Safeguard your data with automatic password breach detection, enabling instant response to potential threats. Monitor user activity through detailed administrative logs and easily export data for audits in compliance with NIS2 and DORA cybersecurity regulations. Maintain full control and confidence, knowing your information is always protected and aligned with the highest security standards.

🔎 Learn more

Ensure the security of your data with perc.pass - download now and protect your passwords in a simple yet effective way!

For more information, visit: percpass.com

Webcomic Reader is a browser extension designed to enhance your webcomic reading experience. Navigate your webcomics with arrow…

Webcomic Reader is a browser extension designed to enhance your webcomic reading experience. Navigate your webcomics with arrow keys, track your progress automatically and have it sync to your Chrome Account! All while the next comic image is being pre-loaded in the background for faster reading.
